title: KITTENTHEIII's VR HORROR MODPACK
description: A simple  horror modpack that will make your horror experience better.
body:
# No longer working on this modpack!!!


# About
KITTENTHEIII's VR HORROR MODPACK is a simple modpack that will make your horror experience better, this modpack adds shaders, optimization mods, immersive mods, and quality of life mods, and this mod uses Vivecraft.

# Main Mods

◉ Vivecraft

◉ Fresh Animations

◉ The Man From The Fog

# FAQ

Q: Is this modpack compatible with PC?

A: Yes, it is compatible with PC, but this modpack is better to be played using a VR headset.

Q: How do i get better performace using this modpack?

A: To get better performace using this modpack, make sure to add around 6-8GB of RAM to the game, if you want you can add more RAM but i recommend using 8GB, and make sure to disable shaders or lower the quality of the shaders that you want to use, you can also test another shaders to see what is the shader that give you more FPS.

Q: How do i activate VR mode?

A: First you will need to go to the start menu and look for a option that says "VR: OFF" and then make sure that you have a compatible VR headset connect to your PC, and then click on the button and put your VR headset on and start playing.

# System Recommendations
I recommend using 6GB of ram or more (i use 8GB), if you have low FPS, i would recommend to change the shaders to low or medium, and if you set your shaders to the lowest option and you still have low FPS i recommend you to disable the shaders.
